name: campusconnect
description: Campus event discovery and management platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.test: concurrently "npm run test --prefix server" "npm run test --prefix client"
scripts.lint: concurrently "npm run lint --prefix server" "npm run lint --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
